title: bouea oppositifolia var. roxburghii
intro: Bouea oppositifolia var. roxburghii, also known as the Canarium tree or Canarium fruit tree, is a species of plant in the family Annonaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Bouea oppositifolia var. roxburghii include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various skin conditions, as well as providing protection against certain diseases due to its antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
